description_long: This is a large, modern two-story house with a dark gabled roof and a mix of brick and dark panel exterior walls. The front features a double garage, a wide driveway, and a fenced-in yard with a pathway leading to the main entrance. The rear of the house opens onto a spacious patio area with outdoor seating, a round hot tub, and a swimming pool, all enclosed by a privacy fence. Large windows are distributed asymmetrically across the facade, providing ample natural light to the interior. The house sits on a rectangular plot with manicured grass areas in the front and hardscaped surfaces in the back. The overall design blends contemporary and traditional elements, emphasizing comfort and outdoor living.
description: A spacious, modern two-story house with a dark gabled roof, brick and panel exterior, double garage, fenced yard, and a backyard featuring a patio, hot tub, and pool.
description_view_0: Front view showing the double garage, main entrance, driveway, and fenced front yard.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the brick exterior, garage, and transition to the backyard patio area.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the large patio, round hot tub, swimming pool, and extensive hardscaping.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the side elevation, backyard features, and driveway access.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a single door, small overhang, and direct path from the driveway, flanked by windows and set within a fenced yard.
